title: otites cuneifolius subsp. hungaricus
intro: Otites cuneifolius subsp. hungaricus, also known as Hungarian otite or Hungarian bugloss, is a subspecies of the Otites cuneifolius plant, a perennial herb that belongs to the borage family. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Otites cuneifolius subsp. hungaricus include soothing coughs and colds, reducing skin irritations, and even acting as a natural expectorant to help clear mucus from the lungs. Herbal preparations of Otites cuneifolius subsp. hungaricus often take the form of teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal benefits and promote overall well-being.
